sentences.text: You have reached a legion property management staff is available from eight AM to three PM Monday through Friday, please listen carefully to your options. If you reach the wrong area. You will not be transferred you will need to call back and press the correct selection. If you know your party's extension press it. Now? If you are calling for the section aid voucher program press one now for all other calls press two now thank you. Region property management that's for Nicole. How may I help you?
Good morning Nicole. I'm trying to reach David. Hey or is he available.
Um, he is out of the office today he'll be back tomorrow.
Um. Okay is is there a voicemail you could transfer me to or should I just try back tomorrow.
Nope, I can definitely transfer you to voicemail one moment. You have reached the mailbox of please leave a message.

David good morning. My name is Dan North I'm calling from rentable hope you're having a good week. I'm I'm give me a call. I sent you an email this morning. Just wanted to follow that up with a phone call like I said calling from rentable we're in Iowa, yes, we do property marketing on our platform as well a lot of different social media avenues to so I was hoping you'd be up for scheduling. Maybe ten fifteen minutes to chat and learn a little bit about our product um to see if it may be
a good fit for you um. So give me a call back if you can six zero eight five one three seven seven six two, otherwise my email is Dan at rentable dot C O alright, thanks David talk soon.

conversation.title: Call: Dan North and David Heyer @ Allegiant Property Management, LLC
